headlines.title: Anthony Zurcher: Little sign of breakthrough as Trump's Iran deadline nears
headlines.description: The US president is in a delicate political position as the final hours to Tuesday's deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz tick down.

headlines.title: Disruption expected as six-day doctors' strike begins
headlines.description: The NHS is advising patients in England to only use emergency services when necessary but attend any confirmed appointments.

headlines.title: Kanye offers to meet Jewish community in UK after Wireless controversy
headlines.description: He said his goal was to 'come to London and present a show of change' through his music.

headlines.title: Warmest weather of the year expected with 25C on Wednesday
headlines.description: The warmest weather of the year is expected on Tuesday and Wednesday as temperatures rise above average, as Simon King explains

headlines.title: More than 1,700 Brits who fell ill in Cape Verde join action against Tui
headlines.description: Tui is investigating the claims and says it is "not in a position to provide a statement at this stage".

headlines.title: China is winning one AI race, the US another - but either might pull ahead
headlines.description: Both sides don't want to let their rival dominate. And the competition may yet be transformed further.

headlines.title: Australia's most-decorated living soldier charged over alleged war crimes
headlines.description: Ben Roberts-Smith, who denies all wrongdoing, previously lost a landmark defamation case over the alleged murders.

headlines.title: Taiwan opposition leader visits China for expected meeting with Xi Jinping
headlines.description: Cheng Li-wun said she "gladly accepted" Xi Jinping's invitation and hopes to be a "bridge for peace".

headlines.title: JD Vance due in Hungary to back Orban's re-election bid
headlines.description: The US vice-president's visit is the latest show of White House support for the Hungarian leader.

headlines.title: Price of first class stamp rises to £1.80
headlines.description: The rise come as the postal service faces criticism over missing delivery targets.

headlines.title: Moon fly-by sees astronauts regain contact with Earth
headlines.description: The Artemis II crew go further than any humans before in Nasa's first crewed mission to the Moon in over 50 years.

headlines.title: Emotional crew names Moon crater after commander's late wife
headlines.description: Artemis II Commander Reid Wiseman's wife died from cancer in 2020 at age 46.

headlines.title: What's on the far side of the Moon?
headlines.description: Artemis II's looping path has carried the crew around the far side of the Moon.

headlines.title: Trump's deadline looms but Asian nations already have deals with Iran
headlines.description: Nations in the region have been keen to reach agreements as their economies are heavily reliant on Middle East energy.

headlines.title: Oil prices rise ahead of Trump's Iran deal deadline
headlines.description: The US president has threatened to take out Iran "in one night" if it does not agree to open the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: 'We're sinking deeper': Iranians brace for infrastructure strikes as Trump deadline nears
headlines.description: Ordinary Iranians respond to the US president's threat to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges unless it opens the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: How rescue of US airman in remote part of Iran unfolded
headlines.description: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.

headlines.title: Fake Australian, Chinese and Brazilian police stations: BBC goes inside a seized scam compound
headlines.description: Almost nothing was known about the Royal Hill casino in Cambodia until the Thai military took control of it in December.

headlines.title: 54 years, 48 leagues, 2,000 grounds - the ultimate football odyssey
headlines.description: BBC Sport travels with the UK's ultimate groundhopper to the final match of a decades-long, history-making journey.

headlines.title: Woman speaks about ordeal after abduction and rape by fake taxi driver
headlines.description: Barzan Nawshowani is serving eight years for the abduction and rape of the woman, who has now spoken to BBC Scotland.

headlines.title: Surprising story behind the Swiss chalet in Manx glen
headlines.description: A popular glen on the Isle of Man is perhaps the last place you would expect to find a Swiss chalet.

headlines.title: The Papers: Doctors 'hold patients hostage' and 'The whole of the moon'
headlines.description: A number of the papers have focused in on the six-day resident doctors' strike, which is due to kick off on Tuesday.

headlines.title: Lil Nas X assault case to be dismissed if he completes mental health programme
headlines.description: The judge said the musician's behaviour when he was arrested in LA last year was "aberrant from his normal conduct".

headlines.title: Schools in knife crime hotspots to get specialist training
headlines.description: A new partnership will provide training for school leaders about knife-crime risk, the government says.

headlines.title: India's top court hears challenges to ruling on women's entry into temple
headlines.description: Experts say the court's decision will have far-reaching consequences for women's religious freedoms in India.

headlines.title: Girl, 11, turns marsh trees into quirky characters
headlines.description: An 11‑year‑old has spent the past year on family walks inventing backstories for each tree.

headlines.title: Call for parents to teach online privacy like road safety
headlines.description: Three in four parents fear their child cannot make safe choices about personal data online, the data watchdog finds.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: The ‘Not Fit For Purpose’ Department - Part 3
headlines.description: Covering the Home Office.

headlines.title: Emma Stone and Ryan Gosling star in an award-winning musical
headlines.description: Exploring the joy and pain of pursuing your dreams

headlines.title: Why Real glamour tie could decide Kane's Ballon d'Or hopes
headlines.description: Harry Kane is the leading goalscorer in Europe but does he need to win a major trophy to have a chance of winning the prestigious award?

headlines.title: Coventry edge ever closer - but who will join them in Premier League?
headlines.description: As Coventry edge ever closer to ending their 25-year wait for Premier League football, who is best placed to join them?

headlines.title: Lawes out of England retirement and will join Sale
headlines.description: Former England captain Courtney Lawes says he is "officially un-retiring from international duty" after signing for Sale for 2026-27.

headlines.title: Gyokeres returns to Sporting as hero and villain
headlines.description: Viktor Gyokeres' impact at Sporting will never be forgotten, but he returns on Tuesday hoping to help fire Arsenal into the Champions League semi-finals.

headlines.title: Why Honda engine is not the only issue with Aston Martin - F1 Q&A
headlines.description: BBC Sport F1 correspondent Andrew Benson answers your latest questions.

headlines.title: Minnesota deny ex-Everton forward Rodriguez has muscle-wasting condition
headlines.description: Minnesota United deny rumours that midfielder James Rodriguez is suffering from a potentially life-threatening muscle-wasting condition.

headlines.title: Record stand as Surrey draw with Warwickshire
headlines.description: Jamie Smith and Dan Lawrence score centuries as Surrey bat through the final day to secure a County Championship draw with Warwickshire.
